title: vangueriella zenkeri
intro: Vangueriella zenkeri, also known as the 'Yellow-bark bush', is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Vangueriella zenkeri include relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and also used in herbal preparations such as capsules or extracts for its medicinal benefits.
